entities.description: As a subsection of 'Other Design Considerations', this section provides detailed information about the PCIe interface design, including specifications, implementation guidelines, and technical considerations.
Refers to the PCIe (Peripheral Component Interconnect Express) interface, a high-speed serial computer expansion bus standard used for connecting hardware components.
Refers to the technical documentation and guidelines provided in this section for implementing the PCIe interface.

relations.description: The concept of 'PCle接口' is the primary focus of section 5.2.5.
The concept of '设计说明' outlines the technical approach and methodology discussed in section 5.2.5.
